MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-28-2014 IN 206, DEFENDANTS HOTEL MIRABELLE, LLC AND SHARON DRUMMOND'S MOTIONTO CONTINUE TRIAL AND CORRESPONDING DATES. HOLIDAY POWELL APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANTS HAVE REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT A STIPULATION RE MEDIATION WAS FILED AND THE DATE FOR MEDIATION WILL BE ON 7/17/14. AFTER FINDING GOOD CAUSE, THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE WAS AGREED UPON BY BOTH PARTIES PER REPRESENTATION OF MISS POWELL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 7/21/14 IS CONTINUED TO 11/3/14 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT
